/usr/bin/c++ -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AssetBundleExtractor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AssetBundleExtractor.dir/CrossPlatformLauncher.cpp.o -o ../bin/AssetBundleExtractor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/bin:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/UABE_Generic:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/AssetsTools:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller ../bin/libUABE_macOS.so ../UABE_Generic/libUABE_Generic.so ../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools.so ../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller
